CustomField.description: Days from IndividualApplication start date by which this permit must be obtained, based on statutory or regulatory deadline. 0 means no fixed statutory deadline. Populated into nepa_required_permit__c.nepa_statutory_deadline_days__c; the flow computes nepa_sla_due_date__c as IA.nepa_start_date__c + this value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days from IA start date to statutory permit deadline (0 = no fixed deadline).
CustomField.label: Statutory Deadline Days
